coverage_note: The bundled CYP2C9 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from CYP2C9 phase I drug oxidation, warfarin/NSAID/phenytoin pharmacogenetics, star-allele activity, and exposure biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000138109: CYP2C9 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: CYP2C9 findings should be read against phase I drug oxidation, warfarin/NSAID/phenytoin pharmacogenetics, star-allele activity, and exposure biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1799853 (CYP2C9*2) is curated as a CYP2C9 marker for CYP2C9 pharmacogenomics context, Warfarin and phenytoin dose-sensitivity biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs1057910 (CYP2C9*3) is curated as a CYP2C9 marker for CYP2C9 pharmacogenomics context, Warfarin and phenytoin dose-sensitivity biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
